products.title: Antik Matelasse Fabric - Smoke
products.description: Description We offer our Antik Matelasse fabric by the yard so that you may use it to make your own custom pieces. All of our fabrics are double wide; 100" - 130" wide on the roll depending on the fabric. After washing, the width of our Antik Matelasse fabric is 110"; a one yard piece is 110"W x 36"L. Due to garment-dyeing limitations, the longest contiuous piece of fabric we are able to dye is 3

products.title: Tru Fabric - Night
products.description: Description We offer our Tru fabric by the yard so that you may use it to make your own custom pieces. All of our fabrics are double wide; 100" - 130" wide on the roll depending on the fabric. After washing, the width of our Sei fabric is 115"; a one yard piece is 115" W x 36" L. Due to garment-dyeing limitations, the longest continuous piece of fabric we are able to dye is 3 yards or 108" long. T
